calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2026 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2026 Continued To Jul-01-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar May-18-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The court grants the unopposed motion to approve the Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment. The court finds that the settlement is in compliance with Proposition 65 (Health & Safety Code, sections 25249.5 to 25249.14); the award of attorney's fees pursuant to the settlement is reasonable under California law on the evidence before the court; and that, considering the factors set out in Health & Safety Code, section 25249.7, subdivision (b)(2), and the facts asserted in the moving papers, the penalty amount is reasonable. A proposed order and proposed judgment have been submitted for review. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2026 Continued To May-20-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
